summary: Iteration 2: verified new APK static audit + 3 GuidancePanel components, plus full iteration_1 regression. Backend 16/16 pytest pass (added 2 audit tests: non-zip graceful + synthetic Singular-SDK zip). Frontend 11/11 checks pass: all 3 guidance panels render with 4 numbered steps, APK upload returns populated audit (has_singular_sdk=true, sdk_version=12.3.1), ApkAuditReport shows 7 findings/row, all 7 tabs + tracker kanban still work.

minor.issue: APK upload reads full file into memory (await file.read()) before storage + audit. Fine for <200MB cap but add explicit size guard before reading to avoid OOM on malicious uploads.
(carried from iter1) status_code uses fragile `dir()` introspection; consider sentinel pattern used in /singular/attribution.
(carried from iter1) DELETE returns 200 when project_id doesn't exist; should 404 for idempotency observability.

issues: GuidancePanel summary uses `truncate` which hides most of the summary on narrow viewports — consider `line-clamp-2` or letting it wrap
(carried from iter1) Missing aria-describedby → a11y console warning

action_items: None blocking. Optional polish: (a) add per-route upload size cap on /apk, (b) address 3 minor backend nits carried from iter1, (c) relax GuidancePanel summary truncation.
critical_code_review_comments: apk_audit.audit() is pure + exception-safe (wrapped in try at caller too) — good defensive design. findings list is stable order which keeps data-testid `audit-finding-{i}` deterministic.
_VERSION_PATTERNS use re.compile at module scope — efficient. Detection correctly returned 12.3.1 from synthetic bytes (`SDK_VERSION = "12.3.1"`).
ApkUpload.jsx: defaultOpen={files.length === 0} is smart UX — guidance auto-open for new projects, collapses once user has uploads.

GuidancePanel toggle button wraps icon+title+caret; Playwright clicks on child elements occasionally didn't register (needed locator-based click with waits). Consider stopPropagation inside toggle or adding pointer-events: none to inner SVG children to make click target more reliable.
server.py now at ~580 lines (was 520). Still manageable; plan the routers split (auth/projects/apk/singular) when it crosses 700.
Audit result stored in Mongo as-is — fine today (findings array is small), but if audit grows, consider a separate apk_audits collection and a lean summary on apk_uploads.
test_credentials: Seeded via mongosh: T1_TOKEN=sess_t1_1776837546275 (user test-user-t1-1776837546275), T2_TOKEN=sess_t2_1776837546275 for isolation.
seed_data_creation: Two user/user_sessions inserted per /app/auth_testing.md. Projects TEST_Iter2_UI, TEST_Iter2_UI2, TEST_Proj, TEST_AuditProj, TEST_DelProj created via API during tests; TEST_Proj + TEST_AuditProj + TEST_DelProj auto-cleaned by tests. Left behind: TEST_Iter2_UI*, owned by test user (safe to ignore).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: T1_TOKEN=<t> T2_TOKEN=<t2> pytest /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py -v. Two new APK audit tests added: test_apk_upload_list_non_zip (graceful bad archive) and test_apk_upload_audit_detects_singular (synthetic zip with com/singular/sdk/ markers + SDK_VERSION constant → expects has_singular_sdk=True, sdk_version=12.3.1, findings list with 'Singular SDK classes present' + 'Singular SDK version discovered' ok=true). Frontend data-testids to rely on: testing-console-guidance, attribution-guidance, apk-upload-guidance (each with `-toggle` and `-step-{i}`), apk-audit-report, audit-finding-{i}. Tab testids: tab-overview/tracker/testing/copilot/attribution/apk/import/comments. Project route is /projects/:id NOT /project/:id.
rca of the issue: No blockers. One flaky-click observation: first click on GuidancePanel toggle occasionally hit the inner <svg> child and didn't bubble to the button's onClick in Playwright force-click mode. Retrying via Locator API worked reliably. Not a product bug — just a testing tip. Everything else behaves exactly per the review request.
